examples.title: Friend Function Example
examples.description: Demonstrates how a friend function accesses private members of a class
examples.explanation: The calculateArea function is declared as friend inside Rectangle class, allowing it to access width and height private members directly without using public getters.

examples.title: Friend Class Example
examples.description: Shows how one class grants friendship to another class
examples.explanation: The Student class is declared as friend inside Teacher class, giving all Student member functions access to Teacher's private members including salary and privateNotes.

examples.title: Using Declaration Example
examples.description: Demonstrates how using declaration allows derived class to access base class protected members
examples.explanation: The using declaration in derived class makes protected members accessible as if they were public in the derived class scope, allowing outside code to access them.
